name: Hacker News: Submit Reply to Comment
summary: Reply to a specific Hacker News comment with a dedupe guard and an explicit approval gate. Click Stop at the gate to leave a draft instead of submitting.
description: Open the Hacker News reply form for a specific comment ID, draft a reply, pause for explicit operator approval, and submit only after the operator clicks Continue. Hard-fails if the same logged-in account already posted the same reply text on the parent thread. To dry-run, click Stop at the approval gate — the textarea stays filled.

comment_id.description: Numeric HN comment id to reply to. The id is the value of the `id` query parameter on the comment's permalink (https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=<comment_id>).

comment_text.description: Reply text to post. Should add to the parent, not just repeat it. The workflow refuses to submit if the same account has already posted this exact text on the parent thread.

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(value)=>{const text=String(value==null?'':value).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text)?'':text;}; const normalize=(value)=>String(value||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase(); const expected=normalize(cleanArg(arg0)); if(!expected) throw new Error('comment_text is required'); const currentUser=String(document.querySelector('#me')?.textContent||'').trim(); const rows=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('tr.athing.comtr')); const matches=rows.map((row)=>({ user:String(row.querySelector('.hnuser')?.textContent||'').trim(), text:normalize(row.querySelector('.commtext')?.textContent||'') })).filter((entry)=>entry.user===currentUser&&entry.text===expected); if(matches.length){ throw new Error(`Duplicate HN reply already exists for user ${currentUser||'unknown'}`); } return { current_user: currentUser || null, duplicate_found: false, scanned_comment_count: rows.length };

steps.name: Fail if the same account already posted the same reply text here

inputs.script: const box = document.querySelector("form textarea[name='text'], textarea[name='text']"); const value = box && 'value' in box ? String(box.value || '').trim() : ''; if (!value) { throw new Error('Reply textarea is empty'); } return { draft_length: value.length };

steps.name: Verify the drafted reply is non-empty

inputs.message: HN reply draft is ready. Click Continue only if you want to post it. Click Stop to leave it as a draft.
inputs.instructions: If the reply adds little, repeats the parent, or reads like spam, click Stop instead of Continue.

steps.name: Pause for approval before submitting the reply
Wait for the reply to post

help.summary: Reply to a specific Hacker News comment with a dedupe guard and an explicit approval gate. Click Stop at the gate to leave a draft instead of submitting.

parameters.comment_id: Numeric HN comment id to reply to. The id is the value of the `id` query parameter on the comment's permalink (https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=<comment_id>).
parameters.comment_text: Reply text to post. Should add to the parent, not just repeat it. The workflow refuses to submit if the same account has already posted this exact text on the parent thread.

examples.command: rzn-browser run hn submit-reply --param comment_id="12345678" --param comment_text="Agreed on cold-start; the gap is actually in Section 4 not Section 5."

examples.description: Dry-run a reply (click Stop at the approval gate to leave the textarea filled without posting)
examples.command: rzn-browser run hn submit-reply --param comment_id="12345678" --param comment_text="Test draft — DO NOT APPROVE"

returns: current_user, scanned_comment_count, and draft_length captured before the gate; on submit, the workflow waits for the post to land but does not return the new reply id (read it from the rendered tree if needed).
notes: Caller must already be logged into Hacker News in the active browser profile.
Dedupe guard compares normalised whitespace + lowercase against existing comments by the same logged-in user on the parent thread.
The approval gate uses request_user_intervention with no timeout. Click Continue (submit) or Stop (leave as draft).
